titleStmt.title: SII 17.322: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 322. (A.R. No. 293 of 1904.) KĀḶAHASTI, KALAHASTI TALUK, CHITTOOR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the north, east and south bases of the central shrine in the Kāḷahastiśvara temple.

This records a gift of 32 cows for burning a perpetual lamp to the deity Tirukkāḷatti-mahādēva by Vaṇṇakkaṉ••••a merchant of Lōkamahādēvipuram alias Karaivaḻippēṭṭai of Perumbāṇappāḍi. The cows were taken over by maṉṟāḍi (shepherd) Ēṟan Kāḷaṉ of Māṟappākkam in Dāmaṟ-kōṭṭam and seems to record another provision (details lost) made for burning a lamp by Dāmōdaraṉ Māmoḻi alias Tirukkāḷatti Nambi of Irāyūr in Paṉaiyūr-nāḍu, a division of••••śikhāmaṇi-vaḷanāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . Etadviśvanṛpaśreṇi maulimālopalābitam . śāsanam rāja rājasya rājakesarivarmmaṇaḥ . tirumakaḷ pola perunilaccelviyun taṉakkey Urimai pūṇṭamaiy maṉakkoḷak kān=taḷḷūrccālai kalamaṟuttaruḷi veṅkai nāṭuṅ kaṅkapāṭiyum nuḷampapāṭiyum taṭikaipāṭiyum kuṭamalai nāṭum kollamum kaliṅka mum Eṇṭicai pukaḻtara Īḻa maṇṭalamum Ilaṭṭapāṭi Eḻarai Ilakkamun tiṇṭiṟal veṉṟit taṇṭāl koṇṭa taṉṉeḻil vaḻurūḻiyuḷ Ellā yāṇṭun toḻataka viḷaṅkum yāṇṭe ceḻiyarait tecukoḷ kovirājakesaripaṉmarāṉa śrīrājarāja devaṟku
yāṇṭu
2 10 7 ĀLines 3 and 4 are engraved in the left margin.
vatu
jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu perumpāṇappāṭi karaivaḻi peṭṭaiyāna lokamādevipurattu viyāpāri vaṇṇakkan cantirā nṟiyen tirukkāḷatti mahādevarkku vaiytta tirunu ndāviḷakkonṟinukku vaiytta cā
vāmuvā pacu 3 10 2 yippacu 3 10 2 kaikkoṇṭu nicatamuḻakku neyyaṭṭuvatānen tāmaṟk koṭṭattu māṟappākkattu manṟāṭi Eṟan kāḷaneṉ can=tirātittavaṟ nicatam Uḻakku ney muṭṭāmeyaṭṭuvatānenn Eṟakāḷa
ne cikāmaṇi vaḷanāṭṭu panaiyūr nāṭṭu Irāyūrp pirāmaṇan kavucika kottirattu tāmotiraṉ māmoḻiyāna tirukkāḷatti nampiyen tirukkāḷatti mahā devaṟku Oru tirununtāviḷakkerippatāka yitu panmāheśara rakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 17.322 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
